title: Sito Dekker
text: Home * People * Sito Dekker Sito Dekker [1] Sito Dekker , a Dutch physicist, electrical engineer, computer scientist, and CEO and Owner of DekTec Digital Video [2] . While affiliated with the Delft University of Technology in the 80s, Sito Dekker was co-author of the computer chess programs Pion and Dutch , and researched on endgame tablebases . Along with David Forthoffer and Lars Rasmussen , he was primary author of the automated database generation program Retro , considering both en passant and castling inside its indexing scheme [3] . They revealed five discrepancies in KRKB [4] from the numbers published by Jaap van den Herik and Bob Herschberg , et al. [5] .
